name: In Boise ID, hearing loss after temp job at Micron—whose comp covers?

mainEntity.name: In Boise ID, hearing loss after temp job at Micron—whose comp covers?

acceptedAnswer.description: Leasing employer's (Manpower) policy typically, as they provide coverage.[3] Key factors: Prove during assignment, causation despite short term.[3] File with their insurer, appeal denials.[3] Attorney traces responsible carrier.[8]
